data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "All 3 children (S1 2ee4, S2 40b8, S3 8451) closed with signed plan-review + completion-verifier attestations; work landed on main via Gerrit feature branch (changes 260/261/262 + merge-back 263, both bot gates MAX). Verifier's two objections resolved on facts: (1) no_tool fail-open proven empirically — with pyright absent from PATH, refute() returns abstain/no_tool/T2 and version()=None; (2) 'children not closed' is a false-negative (all three show status=closed + completion-verifier attestation). Epic is a rollup; substantive signed proof lives on the children.". Session: 392408f19.
